templates.name: Sunken Path
templates.description: A murky, waterlogged path that sinks slightly under your weight. The air is thick with the scent of decay.

templates.name: Stone Bridge
templates.description: A sturdy, ancient stone bridge arches over the terrain, providing a reliable path forward.

templates.name: Cobblestone Way
templates.description: A neatly laid road of smooth, grey cobblestones. It looks like it was built to last for centuries.

templates.name: Muddy Bank
templates.description: The ground is a thick, sucking sludge that threatens to pull your boots off with every step.
